text: REGISTERED No. D. 231 he Itott EXTRAORDINARY P A R T H — S e c t i o n 3 — S u b - s e c t i o n ( i ) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 204] NEW DELHI, TUESDAY, D E C E M B E R 29, 1964/PAUSA B, 1S86 Separate paging is given to this Part in order that it may be files? as a separate compilation MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the lJ.i)th December 1SG4 G.S.R. l S 4 3 . ~ I n exercise of the powers conferred by section 10 of the Dadra and Nagar H a v e l i A c t , 1981 (35 of 1981), the Central G o v e r n m e n t herebv extends i ? , ^ h e / ^ n : C ? n i S t 0 r y °l D a d r a 4 a n d Nagar Haveli the Essential Commodities Act, 195a (10 02 1355), as at present in force m the State of Gujarat (hereinafter referred to as the said Act), subject to the following modifications, namely:— Modifications (1) A n y reference in the said Act to a lav/ not in force, on- to a functionary not in existence, in the Union territory of Dadra and Nagar Haveli shall be construed as a reference to the corresponding law in force or to the corresponding functionary in existence, in that "Union t e r r i - torry: Provided that if any question arises as to who such functionary is the decision of the Administrator of Dadra and Nagar Haveli thereon shall be final. (2) In sub-sections (2) and (3) of section 12A of the said Act, after the words and figures "Code of Criminal Procedure, 1898," the words "or in any other law for the time being in force" shall be inserted.
